MASTER SERVICE AND EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT 
 
This Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of January 2026, by and between AlphaTech 
Solutions Pvt.

DEFINITIONS 
 
1.1 "Conﬁdential Information" means all proprietary, technical, ﬁnancial, and business information disclosed 
by the Company. 
1.2 "Services" refers to software development, maintenance, and consulting services. 
1.3 "Term" refers to the duration of this Agreement. 
 
--- 
 
2.

TERM AND TERMINATION 
 
2.1 This Agreement shall commence on the eƯective date and continue for a period of 2 years. 
 
2.2 The Company reserves the right to terminate this Agreement at any time without prior notice. 
 
2.3 The Employee may terminate this Agreement only after providing 90 days written notice and subject to 
Company approval. 
 
2.4 Upon termination, all obligations related to conﬁdentiality and intellectual property shall survive 
indeﬁnitely. 
 
--- 
 
3.

CONFIDENTIALITY 
 
3.1 The Employee shall not disclose any Conﬁdential Information during or after the Term of this Agreement.

3.2 The Employee shall take all reasonable measures to protect the conﬁdentiality of Company data. 
 
3.3 The Company shall have no obligation to maintain conﬁdentiality of any information provided by the 
Employee. 
 
--- 
 
4.

LIABILITY 
 
4.1 The Employee shall be liable for any and all damages, losses, or claims arising from the performance of 
Services under this Agreement. 
 
4.2 Such liability shall be unlimited and shall include direct, indirect, incidental, and consequential damages. 
 
4.3 The Company shall not be liable for any damages under any circumstances. 
 
--- 
 
5.

INDEMNITY 
 
5.1 The Employee agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Company from and against any claims, 
liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses arising out of or related to this Agreement. 
 
5.2 This indemnity obligation shall apply regardless of whether the Company is partially at fault. 
 
--- 
 
6.

PAYMENT TERMS 
 
6.1 The Employee shall be paid a ﬁxed monthly compensation. 
 
6.2 The Company reserves the right to delay or withhold payments without prior notice. 
 
6.3 No interest or penalty shall be applicable on delayed payments.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY 
 
7.1 All work products, code, designs, and inventions created by the Employee shall be the sole property of the 
Company. 
 
7.2 The Employee waives all moral rights and ownership claims over such work. 
 
--- 
 
8.

NON-COMPETE 
 
8.1 The Employee shall not engage in any competing business during the Term and for a period of 3 years after 
termination. 
 
8.2 This restriction applies globally without limitation. 
 
--- 
 
9.

DISPUTE RESOLUTION 
 
9.1 Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively by a tribunal appointed by the 
Company. 
 
9.2 The Employee waives the right to approach any court or legal authority. 
 
--- 
 
10.

GOVERNING LAW 
 
10.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of India.

FORCE MAJEURE 
 
11.1 The Company shall not be liable for failure to perform due to events beyond its control. 
 
11.2 The Employee shall remain obligated to perform duties even under such circumstances. 
 
--- 
 
12.

GENERAL PROVISIONS 
 
12.1 This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties. 
 
12.2 The Company reserves the right to modify terms unilaterally at any time. 
 
--- 
 
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement on the date ﬁrst written above.
